name: Turtle Pull Along Toy - Gigglescape™: Silicone, 18+ Months, Problem Solving, Fine Motor Skills, No Assembly, 4 Pieces
description:
Your little one can practice movement their way with the Turtle Pull-Along Toy from Gigglescape™. This pull-along toy includes four turtles of different colors and sizes that stack and attach in a train they can pull around. The turtles' heads move while rolling for extra charm, and they are nestable for easy storage after playtime.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
